name: S'mores Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. If desired, omit the chocolate chips and marshmallows to reduce fat content.
2. Butter two 8-inch round springform cake pans or spray with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, mix together the cake flour, graham cracker crumbs, and baking powder.
4. In another bowl, combine the milk, applesauce, and vanilla; stir until blended.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Beat egg whites in a large bowl until frothy.
7. Gradually add cream of tartar and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
8. Sift in sugar and beat until light and glossy, about 2 minutes.
9. Fold half of this batter into the cake mixture until incorporated.
10. Fold in the remaining egg white mixture until combined.
11. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans; spread to an even thickness.
12. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
13. Sprinkle marshmallows and chocolate chips over the tops of the cakes.
14. Place under the broiler, turning occasionally, until the marshmallows are lightly browned.
15. Let cool to warm and serve. Makes 2 layers, approximately 16 servings.
